info.name: SmartDeals API
info.description: Complete API collection for the SmartDeals platform. Covers authentication, campaign management, analytics, event tracking, AI optimization, anomaly detection, benchmarking, attribution, storytelling, rewards, teams, and notifications.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints: register, login, token refresh, and current user retrieval.

request.description: Register a new user account. Requires name, email, and password (min 8 characters). Optionally specify a role: advertiser, campaign_manager, analyst, end_user, or admin.
Authenticate with email and password. Returns a JWT token that is automatically saved to the collection variable for use in subsequent requests.
Refresh the current JWT token. Requires a valid existing token in the Authorization header. Returns a new token.
Retrieve the currently authenticated user's profile information.

item.name: Users
item.description: User management endpoints. List users (admin only), get, update, and delete users.

request.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all users. Requires admin role.
Retrieve a specific user by their UUID.
Update a user's profile. Users can only update themselves unless they have admin role.
Delete a user account. Requires admin role.

item.name: Campaigns
item.description: Campaign management: CRUD operations, status updates, AI optimization toggle, and creative uploads.

query.description: Filter by status: draft, active, paused, completed, suspended

request.description: Retrieve a paginated, filterable list of campaigns. Supports filtering by status, industry, advertiser, and free-text search.
Retrieve full details of a specific campaign by its UUID.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Summer Sports Campaign",
  "description": "Promote summer sports equipment and apparel across mobile and desktop platforms targeting US and EU markets.",
  "budget_total": 5000.00,
  "start_date": "2026-06-01",
  "end_date": "2026-08-31",
  "industry": "sports",
  "targeting_config": {
    "age_range": { "min": 18, "max": 45 },
    "regions": ["US", "UK", "DE", "FR"],
    "devices": ["mobile", "desktop"],
    "languages": ["en", "de", "fr"]
  },
  "reward_value": 0.25,
  "is_age_restricted": false
}

request.description: Create a new advertising campaign. Requires advertiser, admin, or campaign_manager role. The campaign starts in DRAFT status.
Update an existing campaign's properties. Only the campaign owner or an admin can update.
Permanently delete a campaign. Only the campaign owner or an admin can delete.
Update the campaign status. Valid values: draft, active, paused, completed, suspended.
Enable or disable AI optimization for a campaign. Modes: auto_adjust (AI applies changes automatically) or recommendation_only (AI suggests, human approves).
Upload a creative asset (image or video) for a campaign. Uses multipart/form-data with a 'file' field.

item.name: Analytics
item.description: Analytics endpoints for dashboard metrics, time series, funnel analysis, device/region breakdowns, and data export.

request.description: Retrieve aggregated dashboard metrics (impressions, clicks, conversions, CTR, spend, etc.) for a campaign within an optional date range.
Retrieve time series analytics data for charting. Supports hourly or daily granularity.
Retrieve funnel analysis data showing conversion rates through impression > click > conversion stages.
Retrieve analytics breakdown by device type (desktop, mobile, tablet) for a campaign.
Retrieve analytics breakdown by geographic region for a campaign.
Export campaign analytics data as a CSV file download.
Export campaign analytics data as a PDF report download.

item.name: Events
item.description: Ad event tracking endpoints. Track individual events, batch events, and query campaign events.

request.description: Track a single ad event. No authentication required (public SDK endpoint). Event types: impression, click, conversion, share, reward_claim, ad_view, ad_dismiss.
Track multiple ad events in a single request. Maximum 1000 events per batch. No authentication required.
Retrieve paginated events for a specific campaign. Supports filtering by event_type, device_type, and date range.

item.name: Heatmaps
item.description: Geographic heatmap data for campaign event visualization.

request.description: Retrieve geographic heatmap data for a campaign, showing event density by location.

item.name: AI Optimization
item.description: AI-powered campaign optimization: recommendations, applying changes, audit log, and mode configuration.

request.description: Retrieve AI-generated optimization recommendations for a campaign (e.g., budget reallocation, targeting adjustments, creative suggestions).
Apply a specific AI recommendation to a campaign. The recommendation changes are executed and logged in the audit trail.
Retrieve the AI optimization audit log for a campaign, showing all AI actions and recommendations history.
Update the AI optimization mode for a campaign. Modes: auto_adjust (fully autonomous) or recommendation_only (human-in-the-loop).

item.name: Anomaly Detection
item.description: Anomaly detection for campaign metrics: list anomalies, resolve, and trigger manual checks.

request.description: Retrieve detected anomalies for a campaign (e.g., click fraud, unusual traffic spikes, budget anomalies).
Mark an anomaly as resolved. The resolving user is recorded in the audit trail.
Manually trigger an anomaly detection check for a campaign. Returns any newly detected anomalies.

item.name: Benchmarking
item.description: Industry benchmarking data to compare campaign performance against peers.

request.description: Retrieve industry benchmark data for a campaign, comparing its performance metrics (CTR, CPC, conversion rate, etc.) against industry averages.

item.name: Attribution
item.description: Cross-device attribution and user journey tracking.

request.description: Retrieve cross-device attribution data for a campaign, showing how users interact across multiple devices.
Retrieve the full ad interaction journey for a specific user, showing touchpoints across campaigns and devices.
Retrieve device path mapping data showing common device transition paths (e.g., mobile > desktop > conversion).

item.name: Storyteller
item.description: AI-generated campaign performance narratives with export capabilities.

request.description: Generate or retrieve an AI-crafted narrative summarizing campaign performance, key insights, and recommendations in natural language.
Export the campaign story as a formatted PDF document for stakeholder presentations.
Export the campaign story as an HTML document for embedding or email distribution.

item.name: Rewards
item.description: User reward system: view rewards, claim rewards from ad interactions, and check balance.

request.description: Retrieve a paginated list of the authenticated user's earned rewards.
Claim a reward for a specific ad event interaction. The reward value is determined by the campaign's reward_value setting.
Retrieve the authenticated user's total reward balance.

item.name: Teams
item.description: Team collaboration: invite members, manage roles, and view audit logs for campaign teams.

request.description: Invite a user to collaborate on a campaign by email. Roles: owner, editor, viewer.
Retrieve all team members for a specific campaign.
Update a team member's role on a campaign. Roles: owner, editor, viewer.
Remove a member from a campaign team.
Retrieve the team activity audit log for a campaign, showing member additions, role changes, and removals.

item.name: Notifications
item.description: User notification management: view, mark as read, and bulk mark all as read.

query.description: Set to 'true' to return only unread notifications

request.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's notifications. Optionally filter to show only unread notifications.
Mark a specific notification as read.
Mark all of the authenticated user's notifications as read.
